variant_description: Only 3 of 4 emission fields required: omits Work/Machine Center Emissions
Split from 3 to 2: second adjustment uses 1 lot (440) instead of 2 lots (220+220)
Order Tracking Policy set to None: no automatic tracking split, tests rounding fix without order tracking
Both success and failed transactions create journal lines; remove Status filter
Date condition: only set Ending Date when Starting Date is not WORKDATE
Delete flag condition: do not set Ending Date when Delete Exchanged Component is selected
New version condition: do not set Ending Date when Create New Version is selected
Headline should only be hidden for the current user, without affecting other users' headline visibility
Headline should not trigger a database modify if it is already hidden (idempotency)
If the headline record does not exist for the user, it should be created as hidden instead of doing nothing (creation fallback)
VAT Settlement should bypass the Journal Template Name mandatory check only when Preview mode is used (Post = false)
VAT Settlement should bypass the check only when called from the VAT Settlement report (not general posting)
VAT Settlement should bypass the check only for Customer entries, not Vendor entries
Require incoming document on last journal line instead of any line
Require all journal lines reference the same Incoming Document Entry No.
Only update Customer Ledger Entry when new Your Reference is non-empty
Your Reference must not exceed 20 characters
Only update Customer Ledger Entry when entry is not on hold
Only Shpfy Order Id must be cleared when copying; other Shopify fields remain unchanged
Shpfy Order Id should be cleared only for posted invoices copied into new invoices (not other document types)
The reminder email should use the customer email only if the contact email is empty (not when contact is missing)
The reminder email must be set via an event subscriber during reminder creation, not via direct table logic
Custom Amount must be positive only when Emission Factor CO2 is positive; otherwise preserve original sign
Only G/L accounts with Direct Posting enabled should be considered when collecting amounts; non-Direct Posting accounts are excluded
Only issued reminders for customers with a non-empty Language Code should be logged in email related records
Email logging must occur only when triggered via an event subscriber, not via direct table logic
Email should be logged only if the reminder is actually sent, not saved as draft
Vendor Name should be populated only when updated through a validation trigger event, not via passive UI binding
Vendor Name should be populated only when Account Type is Vendor AND Document Type is Invoice
The adjustment process should skip execution only when triggered via VAT entry iteration events and no VAT entries exist
The adjustment process should skip only when no VAT entries exist and VAT Exchange Rate Adjustment is enabled
The service header status should update only when the repair status validation is triggered via OnValidate event
The service header status should update only when the new line has a Pending repair status
The service header status should update only after the service item line is committed (Modify)
The service header status should update only for Service Orders, not for other service document types
The print operation should succeed only when the transaction is committed regardless of GUI mode
The print operation should only be allowed from the Service Order List page, not from the Card page
Non-deductible VAT should only be added to Job Journal Line when the Job currency code is defined (non-empty)
Non-deductible VAT should only be applied when the Job Journal Line has a valid non-zero quantity
The relation should only be validated when the contact is of type Company
Unit Cost and Unit Price must be restored only when posting is triggered through the standard posting action
Unit Cost and Unit Price should only be restored when Quantity is greater than zero
Unit Cost and Unit Price should only be restored if the Resource still exists
Customer change must be triggered via field validation instead of direct function call
System-Created Entry should only be set to false when planning line Type is Item
System-Created Entry should be set to false only when Copy Quantity is enabled
System-Created Entry should be set to false only when source line type is Both Budget and Billable
Only navigate to Credit Memo when Document No. is not empty
Navigation should only work for handled (processed) Outbox transactions
Navigation to Credit Memo only occurs if the document exists; otherwise navigation fails silently
Navigation must support Document No. with Code[50] length instead of Code[20]
Allow non-inventory cost for Assembly Output (broaden condition from Production-only to Production or Assembly)
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al
index 9bc596d4312..cf00000001 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al
@@ -158,10 +158,12 @@ codeunit 5896 "Calc. Inventory Adjmt. - Order"
         if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost (ACY)") then
             InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(
               ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.", InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::"Indirect Cost", "Cost Variance Type"::" ", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost (ACY)");
-        if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
-            if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)") then
-                InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(
-                  ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.", InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::"Direct Cost - Non Inventory", "Cost Variance Type"::" ", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)");
+
+        if ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type" in [ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Production, ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Assembly] then
+            if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
+                if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)") then
+                    InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(
+                      ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.", InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::"Direct Cost - Non Inventory", "Cost Variance Type"::" ", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)");
 
         if Item."Costing Method" <> Item."Costing Method"::Standard then
             exit;
@@ -171,11 +173,12 @@ codeunit 5896 "Calc. Inventory Adjmt. - Order"
               InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::Variance, InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Variance Type"::Material,
               InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Level Material Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Material Cost (ACY)");
 
-        if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
-            if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)") then
-                InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.",
-                  InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::Variance, InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Variance Type"::"Material - Non Inventory",
-                  InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)");
+        if ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type" in [ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Production, ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Assembly] then
+            if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
+                if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)") then
+                    InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.",
+                      InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::Variance, InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Variance Type"::"Material - Non Inventory",
+                      InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)");
 
         if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Level Capacity Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Capacity Cost (ACY)") then
             InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.",

variant_description: Require non-inventory cost for Assembly Output only when Expected Cost = Yes (compound condition with Expected Cost guard)
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al
index 9bc596d4312..cf00000002 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Costing/CalcInventoryAdjmtOrder.Codeunit.al
@@ -158,10 +158,13 @@ codeunit 5896 "Calc. Inventory Adjmt. - Order"
         if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost (ACY)") then
             InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(
               ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.", InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::"Indirect Cost", "Cost Variance Type"::" ", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Indirect Cost (ACY)");
-        if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
-            if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)") then
-                InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(
-                  ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.", InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::"Direct Cost - Non Inventory", "Cost Variance Type"::" ", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)");
+
+        if (ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type" = ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Production) or
+           ((ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type" = ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Assembly) and ItemLedgerEntry."Expected Cost") then
+            if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
+                if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)") then
+                    InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(
+                      ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.", InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::"Direct Cost - Non Inventory", "Cost Variance Type"::" ", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inventory", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Direct Cost Non-Inv. (ACY)");
 
         if Item."Costing Method" <> Item."Costing Method"::Standard then
             exit;
@@ -171,11 +174,13 @@ codeunit 5896 "Calc. Inventory Adjmt. - Order"
               InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::Variance, InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Variance Type"::Material,
               InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Level Material Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Material Cost (ACY)");
 
-        if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
-            if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)") then
-                InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.",
-                  InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::Variance, InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Variance Type"::"Material - Non Inventory",
-                  InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)");
+        if (ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type" = ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Production) or
+           ((ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type" = ItemLedgerEntry."Order Type"::Assembly) and ItemLedgerEntry."Expected Cost") then
+            if MfgCostCalcMgt.CanIncNonInvCostIntoProductionItem() then
+                if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)") then
+                    InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.",
+                      InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Entry Type"::Variance, InventoryAdjustmentBuffer."Variance Type"::"Material - Non Inventory",
+                      InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Mat.NonInvCost(ACY)");
 
         if HasNewCost(InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Level Capacity Cost", InventoryAdjmtEntryOrder."Single-Lvl Capacity Cost (ACY)") then
             InventoryAdjustmentBuffer.AddCost(ItemLedgerEntry."Entry No.",

variant_description: BOM Quantity Per = 0.005 (below rounding precision); must not round to zero
UOM Qty Rounding Precision = 0.01 instead of 1; partial consumption must still be preserved without rounding to zero
Status not set to Active; Amount Type should still remain Discount
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al
@@ -562,6 +562,7 @@
     var
         xAmountType: Enum "Price Amount Type";
     begin
+        CopyTo(PriceSource);
         xAmountType := "Amount Type";
-        if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then
+        if ("Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"]) and ("Status" = "Status"::Active) then
             "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()

variant_description: Amount Type set to Price instead of Discount; should remain Price after closing
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al
@@ -562,6 +562,8 @@
     var
         xAmountType: Enum "Price Amount Type";
     begin
+        CopyTo(PriceSource);
         xAmountType := "Amount Type";
         if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then
-            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()
+            if PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType() <> 0 then
+                "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()

variant_description: No update when selecting same Bill-to Customer
No contact update when Bill-to is Custom Address
Update phone and mobile but not email on Bill-to change
Validation only for Quantity > 0
Validation only when status is Open
Unlink only when Incoming Document Entry No. is non-zero; skip unlink for lines without incoming document
Unlink only for lines with positive Amount; skip unlink for negative or zero amount lines
Unlinking should not be executed during posting; inline unlink logic replaced with exit
Unlink only for General journal template type; skip unlink for non-General templates
Rounding residual applied to first generated pick line instead of last
Picking must strictly follow FEFO order based on earliest expiration date
Rounding correction only applies when Pick According to FEFO is enabled
Manufacturing overhead calculated per production order line individually and then summed
test_patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Manufacturing/SCMCopyProductionBOM.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Manufacturing/SCMCopyProductionBOM.Codeunit.al
index edc1079c082..cf00000001 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Manufacturing/SCMCopyProductionBOM.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Manufacturing/SCMCopyProductionBOM.Codeunit.al
@@ -687,7 +687,7 @@ codeunit 137210 "SCM Copy Production BOM"
 
         // [ASSERT] Overhead in statistics equals expected overhead
         Assert.AreEqual(
-            MfgOverheadExpectedCost,
+            MfgOverheadExpectedCost * 1.5,
             MfgOverheadExpectedCost1,
             StrSubstNo(ManufacturingOverhead,
                 Format(MfgOverheadExpectedCost),
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
index aad60ef36b9..cf00000001 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
@@ -308,7 +308,7 @@ codeunit 99000758 "Mfg. Cost Calculation Mgt."
         ExpMfgDirCost := ExpMatCost + ExpCapDirCost + ExpSubDirCost + ExpCapOvhdCost;
-        ExpOvhdCost := ExpMfgOvhdCost;
+        ExpOvhdCost := ExpMfgOvhdCost + ProdOrderLine."Overhead Rate" * ProdOrderLine."Quantity (Base)";
         if ExpMfgDirCost = 0 then
             ExpMfgOvhdCost := ExpOvhdCost +
               Round(CostCalculationMgt.CalcOvhdCost(ExpMfgDirCost, ProdOrderLine."Indirect Cost %", ProdOrderLine."Overhead Rate", ProdOrderLine."Quantity (Base)"))

variant_description: Manufacturing overhead only applied when production order line quantity exceeds 10
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
index aad60ef36b9..cf00000002 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
@@ -308,6 +308,8 @@ codeunit 99000758 "Mfg. Cost Calculation Mgt."
         ExpMfgDirCost := ExpMatCost + ExpCapDirCost + ExpSubDirCost + ExpCapOvhdCost;
         ExpOvhdCost := ExpMfgOvhdCost;
+        if ProdOrderLine."Quantity (Base)" <= 10 then
+            exit;
         if ExpMfgDirCost = 0 then
             ExpMfgOvhdCost := ExpOvhdCost +
               Round(CostCalculationMgt.CalcOvhdCost(ExpMfgDirCost, ProdOrderLine."Indirect Cost %", ProdOrderLine."Overhead Rate", ProdOrderLine."Quantity (Base)"))

variant_description: Manufacturing overhead only calculated when opening the Production Order Statistics page
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
index aad60ef36b9..cf00000003 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Inventory/Costing/MfgCostCalculationMgt.Codeunit.al
@@ -308,6 +308,8 @@ codeunit 99000758 "Mfg. Cost Calculation Mgt."
         ExpMfgDirCost := ExpMatCost + ExpCapDirCost + ExpSubDirCost + ExpCapOvhdCost;
         ExpOvhdCost := ExpMfgOvhdCost;
+        if not IsStatisticsContext then
+            exit;
         if ExpMfgDirCost = 0 then
             ExpMfgOvhdCost := ExpOvhdCost +
               Round(CostCalculationMgt.CalcOvhdCost(ExpMfgDirCost, ProdOrderLine."Indirect Cost %", ProdOrderLine."Overhead Rate", ProdOrderLine."Quantity (Base)"))

variant_description: Non-Deductible VAT % is 50% instead of 100% on Purchase Invoice with Prices Including VAT
Purchase Invoice posting with Non-Deductible VAT 100% but without Prices Including VAT
Only include entries matching the customer's current posting group
Only include Payment-type document entries in reconciliation
Use Document Date instead of Posting Date for date filtering
Directional constraint: only forward (later) due date updates allowed
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al
index 9ff59101df2..cf00000001 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al
@@ -409,6 +409,7 @@ codeunit 393 "Reminder-Issue"
         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
+        // Only allow forward (later) due date updates
         if NewDueDate < ReminderEntry2."Due Date" then
             exit;

variant_description: Issued-state guard: issued reminders are immutable, due date should not update
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al
index 9ff59101df2..cf00000002 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderIssue.Codeunit.al
@@ -409,6 +409,9 @@ codeunit 393 "Reminder-Issue"
         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
+        if ReminderHeader.Status = ReminderHeader.Status::Issued then
+            exit;
+
         if NewDueDate < ReminderEntry2."Due Date" then
             exit;

variant_description: Do not skip exporting if the third-party fulfillment location is the default fulfillment service
Bill-to Customer No. should always be copied, even if it is empty
Sell-to Customer No. should only be set when the customer has a non-empty No.
Customer Id should not be set when the customer record is temporary
Currency conversion should only apply to Unit Price, not Unit Cost
Currency conversion should only occur when Currency Code is set and exchange rate exists
Component planning should only occur when Respect Planning Parameters is true
Salesperson dimension should override New Location dimension only when no default dimension is defined on the New Location
New Location dimension should only apply when Default Dimension Priority is configured for Location table
Updated dimensions should propagate only if Reminder Header Dimension Set ID is non-empty
Reminder Header dimensions should override only Global Dimension 1, not Global Dimension 2
Reminder Header dimensions should apply only to additional fee entries, not all entries
Reserved quantities should be considered only when Location Require Pick is true
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al
index 0b63877adb3b..32239d687e93 100644

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al
@@ -870,7 +870,9 @@ codeunit 7314 "Warehouse Availability Mgt."
         end else
             AvailQtyBase := CalcInvtAvailQty(Item, Location, WhseWorksheetLine."Variant Code", TempWhseActivLine);
 
-        if Location."Require Pick" then
+        if Location."Require Pick" and
+           (Location."Prod. Consump. Whse. Handling" = Location."Prod. Consump. Whse. Handling"::"Warehouse Pick (mandatory)")
+        then
             QtyReservedOnPickShip := CalcReservQtyOnPicksShips(WhseWorksheetLine."Location Code", WhseWorksheetLine."Item No.", WhseWorksheetLine."Variant Code", TempWhseActivLine);
 
         QtyReservedForCurrLine :=

variant_description: Availability check should be performed per production order, not aggregated across all orders
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al
index 0b63877adb3b..32239d687e93 100644

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al
@@ -870,7 +870,9 @@ codeunit 7314 "Warehouse Availability Mgt."
         end else
             AvailQtyBase := CalcInvtAvailQty(Item, Location, WhseWorksheetLine."Variant Code", TempWhseActivLine);
 
-        if Location."Require Pick" then
+        if Location."Require Pick" or
+           (Location."Prod. Consump. Whse. Handling" = Location."Prod. Consump. Whse. Handling"::"Warehouse Pick (mandatory)")

             QtyReservedOnPickShip := CalcReservQtyOnPicksShipsForCurrentOrder(WhseWorksheetLine."Location Code", WhseWorksheetLine."Item No.", WhseWorksheetLine."Variant Code", TempWhseActivLine);
 
         QtyReservedForCurrLine :=

variant_description: Availability check should ignore bin-level quantities when Bin Mandatory is enabled
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Availability/WarehouseAvailabilityMgt.Codeunit.al
index 0b63877adb3b..32239d687e93 100644

+           (Location."Prod. Consump. Whse. Handling" = Location."Prod. Consump. Whse. Handling"::"Warehouse Pick (mandatory)")
+        then
             QtyReservedOnPickShip := CalcReservQtyOnPicksShips(WhseWorksheetLine."Location Code", WhseWorksheetLine."Item No.", WhseWorksheetLine."Variant Code", TempWhseActivLine);
 
         QtyReservedForCurrLine :=

variant_description: Tracking lines should be preserved only when the new quantity remains greater than zero.
Tracking lines should be preserved only if all tracking quantities remain valid after reduction.
Validation bypass applies only when Job Line Type is Billable; otherwise validation must still execute.
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
index a913f1c1ea1b..cf1_218995_1 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -478,6 +478,10 @@ codeunit 1001 "Job Post-Line"
         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
+        if PurchaseLine.IsNonInventoriableItem() and
+           (PurchaseLine."Job Line Type" = PurchaseLine."Job Line Type"::Billable) then
+            exit;
+
         Job.Get(PurchaseLine."Job No.");
         if Job.GetQuantityAvailable(PurchaseLine."No.", PurchaseLine."Location Code", PurchaseLine."Variant Code", 0, 2) <
            -PurchaseLine."Return Qty. to Ship (Base)"

variant_description: Validation bypass applies only when Location Code is empty.
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
index a913f1c1ea1b..cf2_218995_2 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -478,6 +478,10 @@ codeunit 1001 "Job Post-Line"
         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
+        if PurchaseLine.IsNonInventoriableItem() and
+           (PurchaseLine."Location Code" = '') then
+            exit;
+
         Job.Get(PurchaseLine."Job No.");
         if Job.GetQuantityAvailable(PurchaseLine."No.", PurchaseLine."Location Code", PurchaseLine."Variant Code", 0, 2) <
            -PurchaseLine."Return Qty. to Ship (Base)"

variant_description: Validation bypass applies only for Credit Memo documents (not other purchase types).
patch:
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
index a913f1c1ea1b..cf3_218995_3 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -478,6 +478,10 @@ codeunit 1001 "Job Post-Line"
         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
+        if PurchaseLine.IsNonInventoriableItem() and
+           (PurchaseLine."Document Type" = PurchaseLine."Document Type"::"Credit Memo") then
+            exit;
+
         Job.Get(PurchaseLine."Job No.");
         if Job.GetQuantityAvailable(PurchaseLine."No.", PurchaseLine."Location Code", PurchaseLine."Variant Code", 0, 2) <
            -PurchaseLine."Return Qty. to Ship (Base)"

variant_description: Update should affect the first matching subsequent Place Line only if multiple candidates exist; otherwise fallback to any other matching line.
Quantity propagation applies only when Action Type = Place AND Source Document = Prod. Consumption.
The Ship-to Address should be set to the company address only when the source Sales Order has a custom Ship-to Address.
Only set Ship-to Address to company address when creating a Return Order (not for other document types).
The Ship-to Address must be set via an event subscriber after document creation instead of direct assignment.
Registration should ignore Breakbulk filter only when Breakbulk Filter = true AND user confirms full registration.
Registration should include all lines only for Purchase Order source documents; other sources respect filter.
Non-specific reservation cleanup applies only when the location is configured to pick according to FEFO.
Non-specific reservation cleanup applies only when the warehouse activity comes from a Sales Order, not from other sales document subtypes.
Reset UOM only if new item has different base UOM than previous
Reset UOM only when no quantity has been entered on the journal line
Reset UOM only when Item No. is changed through validation trigger, not programmatic assignment
Invoice overrides shipment even when unreleased: shipment amounts excluded once invoice exists
Only posted shipment amounts should affect customer total: unposted shipments excluded
Block reservation only for non-direct transfers (In-Transit Code is specified)
Block reservation only when transfer quantity is greater than 0
Block reservation only for outbound quantities (Qty. to Ship > 0)
Surplus duplication prevented only when Planning Flexibility = None
Surplus duplication prevented only for lot-tracked items
Surplus duplication prevented only during initial planning, not during recalculation
Dimensions imported only when Allocation % > 0
Dimensions imported only for G/L Account destination type lines
Dimensions imported only when multiple allocation distribution lines exist
